provenance.horizonsQuery: EPHEM_TYPE='VECTORS' VEC_TABLE='1' REF_PLANE='ECLIPTIC' REF_SYSTEM='J2000' OUT_UNITS='AU-D' CENTER='500@<parent body>' TLIST in TDB
provenance.note: Coordinates are verbatim Horizons output strings (AU, ecliptic J2000, planetocentric). anchorJdTdb is the element epoch used for the M0 anchor; the 2461202.5 epoch is the calibration holdout. Moons whose rate fit needed the dense pass also carry vectors at the dense epochs.
